name: Crockpot Coq Au Vin
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove giblets and neck from chicken.
2. Stuff the cavity with garlic cloves and bay leaves.
3. Place the chicken in the crockpot, breast side down.
4. Add sliced onions, carrots, and potatoes to the crockpot.
5. Pour in red wine and seasonings (thyme leaves and parsley).
6. If there is still enough room, add veal stock.
7. Cook on LOW for 8-10 hours or until the chicken is tender.
8. Remove bacon pieces from the cooking liquid before serving.
